headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight). Capitalize section labels with tracking-[0.2em].

body.usage: Use for all standard text, tables, and dense data.

mono.usage: Critical for logs, evidence code blocks, findings IDs, and LLM raw outputs.

visual_enhancers.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use border-collapse style layouts or adjacent 1px borders (border-zinc-800) to create a skeletal, structural feel. Emphasize dense, precise data presentation over soft whitespace.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers or floating command palettes. bg-zinc-950/70 with backdrop-blur-xl and border-b border-zinc-800/50.
visual_enhancers.motion: Minimalist and precise. Hover states should use immediate background color shifts or subtle 1px border highlights. No bouncy or playful animations. Status indicators (like 'scanning') should use a slow opacity pulse.
visual_enhancers.radii: Sharp edges. Use rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px/4px) for all components.

grids_and_layouts.spacing: Dense but highly structured. Use p-4 to p-6 for card internals. Use gap-[1px] with a dark background to create 1px grid lines between items in bento layouts.
grids_and_layouts.dashboard_grid: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4. Hero metrics span 3, threat charts span 8, sidebars/feeds span 4.
grids_and_layouts.sidebar_layout: Fixed left sidebar w-64 with border-r border-zinc-800, right main content area with flex-1.

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Solid colors for primary actions, heavily utilizing the 'modes' colors (Indigo for passive, Red for deep). Outline/ghost for secondary. Always use Phosphor icons.
components.cards: Flat, dark, bordered (border-zinc-800). No drop shadows. Use a slightly lighter background (bg-zinc-900/50) on hover.
components.tabs: Underline style. border-b border-zinc-800 with active tab highlighted via a bottom border in the current mode's primary color. Text should shift from text-zinc-500 to text-white.
components.tables: Dense, text-sm. Hover states on rows (hover:bg-zinc-900). Monospaced text for IDs, IPs, and timestamps.
components.code_blocks: bg-black border border-zinc-800 p-4 rounded-none font-mono text-sm overflow-x-auto. MUST include a sticky top-right copy-to-clipboard button.
components.badges: Small, uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-[10px] or text-xs. Used heavily for status (RUNNING, BLOCKED, COMPLETED) and modes (PASSIVE, DEEP).

pages.overview: Bento grid of high-level stats (Active Targets, Audits, Findings). Threat analysis charts (Recharts).
pages.targets: Registry table of targets with columns for URL, Type, Scope limits. Scope Policy badges dictate passive vs. deep mode allowed.
pages.policies: Toggle lists for rules. Visual warning section for deep mode authorization.
pages.audit_runs: List/Table of runs. Show progress bars for active runs and mode badges.
pages.run_detail: Complex view with Run meta info at top. Tabs: Tasks (orchestration workflow), Findings (list), Evidence (code/API blocks with copy), Report (Markdown output).
pages.findings: Searchable library of all findings. Badges for severity.
pages.reports: Markdown preview windows with export/copy actions.
pages.settings: Form inputs for LLM API keys and model selection.
pages.audit_log: Terminal-style chronological feed of admin actions using JetBrains Mono.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for text. Hover states must explicitly set background and text colors. Focus rings should use ring-1 ring-zinc-500 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-black.
accessibility.data_testid: Required on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='run-audit-btn', data-testid='copy-evidence-btn').

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor icons (Regular or Duotone weight) for a technical, precise look. Install via: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react

charts.instructions: Use Recharts for vulnerability distribution and audit volume over time. Apply the severity colors to the charts. Remove grid lines or make them very faint (stroke='#27272A').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a persistent left sidebar layout wrapping all 9 specified pages.
Install and configure fonts: Chivo (headings), IBM Plex Sans (body), JetBrains Mono (mono).
Implement routing for: Overview, Targets, Policies, Audit Runs, Run Detail, Findings, Reports, Settings, Audit Log.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily override them: remove large border radii (make them rounded-sm or rounded-none), remove soft shadows, use border-zinc-800.
Implement the Run Detail page with Shadcn Tabs for Tasks, Findings, Evidence, and Report. This is the core workspace.
Ensure all evidence, code blocks, and report outputs have obvious 'Copy' buttons (crucial for admin workflows).

Add visual gating (e.g., a striking dialog or stark warning banner) when switching a target or run to 'Deep Mode'. The UI must shift to use the 'Deep' mode colors (Red/Amber) to indicate elevated risk.
Use Recharts for the Overview dashboard charts.
Set dark mode as the default and only theme (force dark classes).
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this. Create a highly technical, precise, and authoritative 'Red Team' feel.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and crisp 1px borders.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
